title: The Moorshedabad Act, 1891
full_text: The Moorshedabad Act, 1891 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189115 Act Number: 15 Enactment Date: 1891-03-21 Act Year: 1891 Short Title: The Moorshedabad Act, 1891 Long Title: An Act to confirm and give effect to an Indenture between the Secretary of State and the Nawab Bahadoor of Moorshedabad, Amir-ul-Omrah. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 21-03-1891 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Moorshedabad Act, 1891 Statements of Particulars Penalty Section 1. Title and commencement. Section 2. Confirmation of indenture of March, 1891. Section 3. Additions to schedule to indenture. Section 4. Limitation for claims to scheduled immoveable property. Section 5. Perpetual descent of property. Section 6. Relief from stamp and registration laws. Schedule 1.
